scene: Stan on the spot under a quiz-show spotlight with a big empty thought bubble, big black caps NAME A LIVING GENIUS. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Stan straining hard, sweat drop, the thought bubble still completely empty, big black caps ...YOU CAN'T. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Three glowing old portraits in a row labeled NEWTON, DARWIN, EINSTEIN, big black caps WE USED TO MINT THEM. (Doodle-Einstein is a crude stick figure with a round white head, wild messy white hair sticking out, a bushy white mustache, dot eyes, thin line body.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
The portrait row continuing into an empty dusty frame with cobwebs, big black caps THEN IT STOPPED? Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A big glowing red question mark over a world map, big black caps OR DID IT? Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
